case_title: TORRES, MIGUEL C. vs. PLACKETT,ROBERT IND&DBA BERKELEY IRON,SOLE PROPRIE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, MIGUEL C. AS TO DEFENDANT PLACKETT,ROBERT IND&DBA BERKELEY IRON,SOLE PROPRIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORRES, MIGUEL C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLACKETT,ROBERT IND&DBA BERKELEY IRON,SOLE PROPRIE $2,622.03 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,702.03
